---
#Titre de la page à afficher
title: "Welcome to my personal website !"
#Image à afficher
image: "images/me.png"
#Liens utiles
links:
    #CV
  - text: "CV"
    href: "links/cv.pdf"
    #Linkedin
  - icon: linkedin
    href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/bellier-benjamin/"
    #Github
  - icon: github
    href: "https://github.com/bbellier"
    #Google scholar
  - icon: google
    href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=GjNCJe0AAAAJ&hl=fr"
    #Researchgate
  - text: "RG"
    href: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Benjamin-Bellier"
    #orcID
  - text: "OR"
    href: "https://orcid.org/0009-0006-6863-241X"
#Sortie
output:
  #Utilisation du template "trestles" du package "postcards"
  postcards::trestles
#Article distill
site: distill::distill_website
---
